rows.current_contract: Cloud custody / provider surface (dynamic, not statically discoverable)
rows.target_contract: M7 cloud provider adapter with WBC receipt emission on every custody state change
rows.boundary_conditions: Cloud API calls must be wrapped in a boundary handler; direct SDK calls are denied
rows.fail_closed: Cloud operation is aborted; custody state is not mutated; incident logged
rows.proof: Cloud adapter enrollment + WBC receipt for every custody state transition
rows.rollback_policy: Disable cloud adapter; custody state reconciliation from WBC ledger; no direct SDK fallback
rows.mixed_version_policy: Cloud provider SDK version is pinned; version bumps require adapter re-enrollment
rows.retirement_gate: After all cloud custody operations route through enrolled adapter and legacy paths have zero callers

rows.current_contract: Compatibility shim / adapter bridging old and new writer surfaces
rows.target_contract: M7 compatibility adapter enrollment with explicit version gating and expiry
rows.boundary_conditions: Shim must prove both old and new writer identities; cannot introduce new authority
rows.fail_closed: Shim returns error; both old and new paths are blocked; incident logged
rows.proof: Compatibility adapter enrollment + version gate test + zero-authority proof
rows.rollback_policy: Disable shim; old readers see UNKNOWN; new writers use direct path; no dual authority
rows.mixed_version_policy: Shim is explicitly versioned with expiry; after expiry, old path is rejected
rows.retirement_gate: After all old readers are migrated and shim expiry date has passed

rows.current_contract: Provider/dynamic surface (plugin loader, generated code, template renderer, subprocess)
rows.target_contract: M7 provider enrollment with static manifest and receipt obligation
rows.boundary_conditions: Provider must be enrolled in the controlled-writer registry; generated code must be verifiable
rows.fail_closed: Provider invocation is blocked; fallback to safe default; incident logged
rows.proof: Provider enrollment manifest + static verification of generated code + WBC receipt
rows.rollback_policy: Disable provider via enrollment revocation; no direct invocation fallback
rows.mixed_version_policy: Provider version is pinned; generated code is content-addressed; version bumps require re-enrollment
rows.retirement_gate: After all consumers migrate to enrolled provider or the provider surface is retired

rows.current_contract: WBC boundary contract (boundary_contracts.py) or static discovery surface
rows.target_contract: M7 controlled-authoritative-writer gate with conjunctive Run Authority + Custody fence
rows.boundary_conditions: Caller must hold current Run Authority grant AND Custody lease/epoch
rows.fail_closed: Reject write; log attempt to observability; do not advance state
rows.proof: M6 inventory row + M7 controlled-writer enrollment + M8 producer adoption
rows.rollback_policy: Disable writer promotion without restoring legacy write authority; keep evidence readable
rows.mixed_version_policy: Old readers see stale data until cutover; new writers require explicit version gating
rows.retirement_gate: After zero callers for one full milestone cycle and M8/M10 proof of replacement

rows.current_contract: Resident runtime module (kernel/execution/supervisor) with writer surface
rows.target_contract: M7 resident writer enrollment with fence check on every write path
rows.boundary_conditions: Must pass Run Authority fence + Custody epoch check before mutating resident state
rows.fail_closed: Raise FenceError or CustodyLeaseError; resident state is not mutated; observability event emitted
rows.proof: M6 inventory row + M7 enrollment + fence/epoch check in code path
rows.rollback_policy: Disable writer path via feature flag; resident state reconciliation from WBC ledger; never restore legacy write authority
rows.mixed_version_policy: Resident modules are version-locked to repo commit; mixed versions require explicit compatibility shim
rows.retirement_gate: After all callers migrate to WBC-mediated path and resident writer is no longer enrolled

rows.current_contract: Resident runtime module (kernel/execution/supervisor) with writer surface
rows.target_contract: M7 resident writer enrollment with fence check on every write path
rows.boundary_conditions: Must pass Run Authority fence + Custody epoch check before mutating resident state
rows.fail_closed: Raise FenceError or CustodyLeaseError; resident state is not mutated; observability event emitted
rows.proof: M6 inventory row + M7 enrollment + fence/epoch check in code path
rows.rollback_policy: Disable writer path via feature flag; resident state reconciliation from WBC ledger; never restore legacy write authority
rows.mixed_version_policy: Resident modules are version-locked to repo commit; mixed versions require explicit compatibility shim
rows.retirement_gate: After all callers migrate to WBC-mediated path and resident writer is no longer enrolled

rows.current_contract: Shell/wrapper script with boundary effects (no Python handler mediation)
rows.target_contract: M7 wrapper gate: shell scripts must route through Python boundary handler or be explicitly enrolled
rows.boundary_conditions: Wrapper must produce a content-addressed receipt; direct fs mutation is denied unless enrolled
rows.fail_closed: Script execution fails with non-zero exit; receipt not emitted; boundary event logged
rows.proof: Wrapper enrollment in M7 controlled-writer registry + content-addressed receipt evidence
rows.rollback_policy: Remove execute permission or replace with no-op stub; never restore dual authority
rows.mixed_version_policy: Wrapper version is pinned to repo commit; old wrapper versions are rejected by receipt validation
rows.retirement_gate: After replacement Python handler is landed and all callers are migrated

rows.target_contract: M7 wrapper gate: shell scripts must route through Python boundary handler or be explicitly enrolled
rows.boundary_conditions: Wrapper must produce a content-addressed receipt; direct fs mutation is denied unless enrolled
rows.fail_closed: Script execution fails with non-zero exit; receipt not emitted; boundary event logged
rows.proof: Wrapper enrollment in M7 controlled-writer registry + content-addressed receipt evidence
rows.rollback_policy: Remove execute permission or replace with no-op stub; never restore dual authority
rows.mixed_version_policy: Wrapper version is pinned to repo commit; old wrapper versions are rejected by receipt validation
rows.retirement_gate: After replacement Python handler is landed and all callers are migrated

row_hash_coverage: each row hash computed from deterministically ordered JSON excluding row_hash field
fail_closed_default: Any writer whose authority classification is uncertain defaults to fail-closed (deny). Writers must be explicitly enrolled to gain write access.
